mood: Professional, trustworthy, hospitable yet tech-forward. Grounded like a restaurant, precise like AI.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16, py-24, py-32 to create breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. Mix col-span-1 and col-span-2 in grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 to create asymmetrical, engaging bento layouts.
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: Containers with borders MUST have generous internal padding (p-8 or p-12) to prevent text collision.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F8F6]/80 with a delicate border-b border-[#E5E3DB]/50.
surface_strategies.cards: Neumorphism & Crisp: Flat white surface (#FFFFFF), 1px border (#E5E3DB), soft diffuse shadow (shadow-sm). Hover state adds slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-md.
surface_strategies.footer: Contrast Shift: Dark surface (e.g., bg-[#1A1A1A]) with massive padding (py-32).

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All buttons must explicitly shift bg and text colors. Cards should subtly elevate.
motion_and_interaction.scroll: Implement smooth scroll behavior. Sections should gently fade-in-up.
motion_and_interaction.data_testid: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, accordions, links) MUST include a kebab-case data-testid attribute describing their role (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').

component_guidelines.buttons: Shadcn based but rounded-md or rounded-full. Primary uses #4A5D23. Accent uses #E07A5F.
component_guidelines.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select. Never native HTML inputs.
component_guidelines.accordion: Use Shadcn Accordion for FAQs. Enhance with custom open/close styling.

page_sections.name: Navigation
page_sections.layout: Sticky header, flex space-between, z-50. Left: Logo. Right: Links and 'Book a Call' CTA button.

page_sections.name: Hero
page_sections.layout: Bento layout or bold asymmetrical split. Large animated stats ('₹27L+ lost annually', '83% callers never call back').
page_sections.visuals: Incorporate hero_image subtly (perhaps as a split column or within a large bento card). Do not use full-screen heavy overlay. Keep the text area crisp and readable.

page_sections.name: VSL Video Placeholder
page_sections.visuals: Rounded corners, dark background or image background with a large Play icon. Subtle pulse animation on play button.

page_sections.name: Pain Points Grid
page_sections.visuals: Cards for Missed calls, No-shows, Staff on phone, No repeat visits. Use earthy accent colors for card backgrounds (e.g., bg-[#E07A5F]/10) and primary color for icons.

page_sections.name: Proof / Stats Row
page_sections.visuals: Include a massive quote in 'heading_font' and prominent stat ('90 days results').

page_sections.name: How It Works (Timeline)
page_sections.layout: 4-step timeline. Can be a vertical stack of interlocking cards or an elegant horizontal flow.
page_sections.visuals: Use 'Tracing Beam' inspired connections (a vertical or horizontal line that links the steps). Include chef_cooking image alongside.

page_sections.name: Deliverables Grid
page_sections.visuals: Clean, crisp cards. Titles: AI Voice Assistant, WhatsApp Bot, No-Show Prevention, Dashboard, Follow-up, Integration. Use lucide icons.

page_sections.name: Booking Section
page_sections.layout: Split layout. Left: Checklist of benefits. Right: Calendly placeholder.
page_sections.visuals: Calendly placeholder is a pristine white card with Shadcn inputs resembling a calendar and time-slot selection form.

page_sections.name: FAQ
page_sections.visuals: Shadcn accordion with a clean border-bottom for each item.

page_sections.name: Final CTA
page_sections.visuals: Background: bg-primary (#4A5D23). Text: White. Large headline, secondary text, and a prominent 'Book a Call' button in Accent color.

page_sections.name: Footer
page_sections.visuals: Dark background (#1A1A1A) with light text. Large text element ('Sadafal Tech') at the bottom.

hero_image.placement: Hero section bento card or subtle background element

chef_cooking.placement: Alongside 'How it works' timeline or proof section

owner_smiling.placement: Next to the final CTA or booking section
